name: user_id
description: Which person this reading belongs to

name: measurement_date
description: Local calendar date of the reading (used for date partitioning)

name: tz_offset_minutes
description: User's UTC offset at time of reading (raw API seconds ÷ 60)

name: irregular_hb
description: Irregular heartbeat detected — lower reading quality

name: movement_detect
description: Body movement detected — lower reading quality

name: cuff_wrap_detect
description: Cuff wrap error detected — lower reading quality

name: notes
description: Free-text notes from the Omron Connect app

name: ingested_ts
description: When the pipeline stored this row

name: raw
description: Full Omron API payload for this reading (lossless, future-proof)
